Ready for review: MigrationDefinition value object, HasMigrationsInterface, FilesystemManifestLoader, MigrationRegistry with DependencyGraph + DFS cycle detection, MigrationCycleException + MigrationDependencyMissingException, integration test for ServiceProvider boot wiring (filesystem + provider sources; cycle propagation). 7953 tests, 0 failures.

review.reference: Approved: FR-011..FR-017 covered; full phpunit 7953/0/0 (2 skipped baseline); cs+phpstan+composer-policy+package-layers green; Kahn (DependencyGraph::topologicalOrder, lexicographic tie-break) + DFS three-color (CycleDetector, back-edge path extraction with closing repeat) is a defensible deviation from the Tarjan SCC hint — FR-015 mandates a cycle PATH which DFS produces natively while Tarjan would need extra work to extract from an SCC; withMigrationProviders() seam is properly @internal-tagged with rationale (parallel to WP01 PluginRegistry, awaits generic kernel capability bus); MigrationDefinition is final readonly with @api, exhaustive constructor validation (id regex, process map all three shapes, no self-reference, no duplicate deps); @api on all 9 public surfaces; FilesystemManifestLoader sorts paths lexicographically (R2 mitigation); MigrationRegistry eagerly booted from ServiceProvider::boot() so structural errors surface at framework startup; HasMigrationsInterface referenced in fixtures and docs/specs; no psr/log, no service locators, no class-string registries; layer compliance migration→foundation only.

Ready for review — id-map + SourceId + idempotency primitives complete; all gates green; full suite Tests: 8004, Assertions: 20495, 0 failures.

review.reference: Approved at 76298e805. All gates green (8004 tests pass, cs-check, phpstan, composer-policy, layers; dead-code clean for WP04 files). FR-025..FR-031 implemented with @spec tags; 51 new tests (13 SourceId / 9 CanonicalForm / 17 MigrationIdMap / 8 SourceReadException / 4 integration incl. transactional rollback, cross-connection visibility, schema up/down/up, run_id tiebreaker). Accepted tradeoffs: (a) src/ layout per owned_files (not data-model.md's IdMap/ subdir) -- mechanical-only follow-up if needed; (b) MigrationIdMap::delete()/deleteAllForMigration() pre-check via lookupDestination() since DatabaseInterface::delete() does not surface affected rows -- acceptable for non-hot-path migration workloads; (c) portable upsert via SELECT+UPDATE-or-INSERT inside caller's transactional() block -- no driver branching, single-statement native upsert deferred. Forwarded: WP07 owns migration_run_state R2 clock-collision tests; WP10 owns MySQL/Postgres conformance for migration_id_map. database-legacy is Layer 0, so migration's L3 require is policy-clean.

WP05 ready for review — EntityDestination + factory + DestinationWriteException + SaveContext::isImport + fixtures + 12 integration tests. cs-check (2 passes), phpstan, layer-check, composer-policy, full phpunit (8101 tests, 20692 assertions) all green.

review.reference: WP05 approved. Hard gates green (phpunit 8101/20692; cs-check; phpstan; check-composer-policy; check-package-layers). FR-018..FR-024 + FR-029/FR-031 satisfied. Atomicity: write() wraps EntityRepository::save() + idMap->upsert() inside MigrationIdMap::transactional(); atomicity_save_failure_rolls_back_id_map_upsert test asserts id-map row absent after stream-resource JSON-encode throw inside the transaction. Skip path (FR-031): hash equality on prior idMap row returns prior WriteResult BEFORE the transaction; verified by skip_path_unchanged_hash_returns_prior_write_result_without_save_or_upsert (event counter unchanged across two writes). Access: GateInterface::denies('create'|'update') with reason codes entity_create_denied / entity_update_denied; ForbidAllPolicy test confirms exception path AND no id-map leak. SaveContext::isImport added as a purely additive readonly property (default false) with 9 unit tests; existing call sites unchanged. Double-event dispatch (destination dispatches BeforeSave/AfterSave around EntityRepository::save()) accepted as the only currently-feasible way to thread isImport through events given EntityRepository::save() does not accept SaveContext; assertions confirm captured event saveContext()->isImport === true. No direct DBAL entity-table writes (rg ->insert\(/->update\( clean). Layers green: composer require contains only L0/L1 (foundation, database-legacy, entity, entity-storage, access). Fixtures kept under tests/Fixtures (autoload-dev only). rollback() raises \LogicException — explicit forward to WP08. M-001 revisionable driver row-count-vs-in-memory-id quirk noted as pre-existing; out of scope. Forwards: WP07 (override resolveRunId); WP08 (implement rollback()); WP10 (conformance use CanonicalForm::encode + sha256 recipe and MigrationTestWidget fixtures); WP11 (supply fieldMap for CSV->entity translation).

Ready for review — CLI runner core (MigrationRunner + ProcessChainExecutor + RunOptions/RunReport + MigrationAbortedException) + three import:* commands wired via ImportServiceProvider; EntityDestination gained withRunId() per WP05 forward; MigrationIdMap gained maxLastImportedAt() for status. 284 migration+CLI tests + 8144 full suite green; cs-check/phpstan/layers/composer-policy all clean. Verified bin/waaseyaa import:run --help renders and import:status executes.

review.reference: WP06 APPROVED. Gates: phpunit 8144/20800 (0 fail/0 err, 8 dep, 2 skipped pre-existing); cs-check OK; phpstan OK (1300 files, 0 errors); check-composer-policy OK; check-package-layers OK; audit-dead-code warn-only (27 findings — typed-data ignore.unmatched, pre-existing baseline noise, not WP06-introduced); bin/waaseyaa import:status smoke-tested OK (clean empty table, correct columns). FR coverage: FR-032 import:run + tests; FR-033 import:run-all topo-sort via DependencyGraph; FR-034 import:status per-migration + all-migrations with LAST RUN via MigrationIdMap::maxLastImportedAt; FR-037/038 forward hooks recorded; FR-039 --dry-run skips destination writes (tested); FR-040 --limit (tested); FR-045 all 7 exception types with stable code fields; FR-046 per-record errors captured in RunReport::errors (cap 100); FR-047 --halt-on-error raises MigrationAbortedException (tested); FR-048 outer catch wraps uncaught throwables. runId: one UUIDv7 per MigrationRunner::run(), threaded via EntityDestination::withRunId() (readonly clone factory); --run-id override accepted. WP03 forwards applied (ProcessException::sourceField, LookupProcessor onMiss='fail' CODE_LOOKUP_MISS, plugin throw PROCESS_PLUGIN_THREW). Cross-WP additions ACCEPTED: (1) MigrationIdMap::maxLastImportedAt() — unit-tested, canonical persistence pipeline (DBAL via DatabaseInterface), smallest tractable SELECT for FR-034; (2) EntityDestination::withRunId() — immutable clone factory, readonly runIdOverride, WP05 atomicity/access/skip tests still green (full phpunit). composer.lock changes scoped: new waaseyaa/migration package + ImportServiceProvider + MakeStorageMigrationServiceProvider on CLI + entity-storage i18n require — no unrelated package drift. Fixtures (InMemorySource/InMemoryDestination/AlwaysFailingProcessor) under tests/_fixtures/ registered via autoload-dev only (Waaseyaa\\Migration\\PluginFixtures\\). Deviations ACCEPTED with forward notes: RunReport::summaryLine() state vocab (complete/partial/failed/pending/aborted) shape-equivalent to T033 sketch; exit code 4 (error-rate halt) collapsed into 5 — split forward to WP07. ProcessChainExecutor without PluginRegistry collaborator ACCEPTED. EXPLICIT FORWARDS WP07: (a) populate FAILED/SKIPPED columns in import:status (currently 0 with TODO markers), (b) split exit code 4 back out for error-rate halt, (c) override resolveRunId() if resume reuses prior run-id, (d) absorb MigrationAbortedException partial reports into migration_run_state, (e) consider WriteResult::wasSkip flag to remove extra lookupDestination SELECT in MigrationRunner hot path. FORWARDS WP09: per-migration lock around MigrationRunner::run() raising MigrationConcurrencyException (run-level -> FR-048). FORWARDS WP11: runner is end-to-end ready; CSV->entity drives real MigrationDefinition with EntityDestination through bin/waaseyaa import:run. Force flag used because untracked review-artifact tmp/ in worktree (not part of WP06 deliverables; no source modifications).

Ready for review — resume + progress tracking complete (T039-T043). 8179 tests pass; FR-037/FR-038 satisfied; import:status now shows real FAILED/SKIPPED counts.

review.reference: Approved. Gates: phpunit 8179/8179, phpstan 0 errors, cs-check clean, check-composer-policy OK, check-package-layers OK, audit-dead-code warn-only baseline. FR-037: import:resume <id> + MigrationRunner::runResume() reuses prior run_id via latestRunForMigration; skip-by-ordinal contract documented in PHPDoc (sources MUST yield deterministic order; id-map cross-check per FR-031 provides redundancy). FR-038: migration_run_state table per data-model §4.2 with item_status (not status), composite PK (migration_id, source_id_hash), migration_run_state__run index; per-record heartbeat AFTER processOne() returns (success/skip) and in error catch via safeHeartbeat/safeRecordError (best-effort try/catch; cannot strand run). MigrationRunState: @api only on latestPositionForRun/lookupItem/countByStatus; write methods @internal. latestPositionForRun uses SELECT MAX(position). ImportStatusCommand FAILED/SKIPPED now sourced from countByStatus() with regression test. MigrationRunner constructor nullable MigrationRunState preserves WP06 backward compat. ServiceProvider wires both bindings. Smoke: 'import:resume nonexistent_xyz' -> 'unknown migration' + exit 2 (clean). Tests: MigrationRunStateTest 24, ResumeFlowTest 6 (interrupt-at-50/resume/run_id-reuse/idempotent-resume/no-prior-run), ImportResumeCommandTest 4. Implementer-flag disposition: (1) source-ordering contract = accepted, PHPDoc + resumeSafe deferred to WP10; (2) per-record heartbeat = accepted (correctness > throughput per spec); (3) exit code 4 'deviation' = NOT a deviation; WP07 prompt T042 specifies exit 0/1 only; properly forwarded to WP08; (4) InMemoryDestination id-map skip gap = acceptable, full e2e deferred to WP11 per spec §Out-of-scope; (5) best-effort heartbeat = acceptable. Forwards: WP08 owns exit-code-4 + rollback↔migration_run_state interaction; WP10 adds resumeSafe capability flag; WP11 e2e with 1000-record CSV. No psr/log imports. Force flag used: only untracked phpstan cache (tmp/) + .spec-kitty/ runtime dirs present — no uncommitted WP07 deliverables. Lane HEAD 992016eb.

Rollback + reset CLI complete; all gates green; 8201 tests pass

review.reference: WP08 approved: rollback platform complete. EntityDestination::rollback() replaces WP05 LogicException with real semantics (gate-check delete -> BeforeDeleteEvent -> EntityRepository::delete -> AfterDeleteEvent); RollbackWalker walks MigrationIdMap::walkReverseCreationWithKeys in reverse-creation order with best-effort per-record failure capture (FR-043, FR-044); RollbackReport/RollbackError value objects bound in-memory error capture; FR-042 idempotency verified by missing-entity no-op test; FR-036 import:reset clears id-map+run-state without touching entities; FR-035 import:rollback CLI exit 0/1/2. Cross-WP additive changes accepted: MigrationIdMap.deleteByHash + walkReverseCreationWithKeys, MigrationRunState.deleteAllForMigration @api alias, DestinationWriteException.entityDeleteDenied/entityDeleteFailed factories - all preserve existing semantics, full WP05/WP07 tests still green (8201/8201 OK). Sequential entity-delete-then-id-map-delete (non-transactional) accepted with sound retry rationale (entity-already-absent path makes re-rollback a clean no-op). Strict reverse-creation order verified at RollbackWalkerTest with pinned-timestamp fixtures; integration test verifies counters with same-second timestamps. Exit code 4 split correctly excluded as out-of-scope per canonical WP08 prompt. Gates: phpunit 8201 OK; cs-check clean; phpstan 1308 files OK; composer-policy OK; package-layers OK; dead-code warn-only baseline (zero on WP08 files). Smoke: import:rollback/reset on unknown migration exit=2; status/run unaffected; both commands visible in CLI list with FR annotations. Forwards: WP09 must wrap RollbackWalker::rollback and gate import:rollback/import:reset; WP11 reuses RollbackTest fixtures for full teardown verification.
